title: Junior Revenue Manager at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners
company: ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners:
ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISS Facility Services India South Asia Partners!
